title: Planning a NAS upgrade? Check out these Seagate IronWolf and BarraCuda hard drive deals at Newegg
summary: The Seagate IronWolf 4TB NAS hard drive is currently available for $235.99 at Newegg. The IronWolf drive offers 4TB CMR storage, 5400 RPM performance, a 256MB cache, SATA 6Gb/s connectivity, rotational vibration sensors, and support for 24/7 operation.
